rulings.Case Title: RONALD E ELIJAH et al VS. RS INVESTMENT MANAGEMENT CO., L.L.C. et al

rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR FRIDAY, AUGUST 18, 2006. DEFENDANT RS INVESTMENT MANAGEMENT CO., RS INVESTMENT MANAGEMENT AND G HECHT'S Motion For Sanctions IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 301 PURSUANT TO 170.6 CHALLENGE AGAINST JUDGE QUIDACHAY CHALLENGE.
